prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic vertical portrait of a handsome young man standing in a warm golden-hour medieval stone fortress or castle courtyard, facing the camera from the waist up. He has thick dark swept-back hair, light-to-medium skin, refined masculine features, and wears a dark charcoal double-breasted wool overcoat over a black scarf, styled like a modern aristocratic falconer. His right arm is raised at chest height wearing a worn brown leather falconry glove with dangling leather jesses and small metal rings; exactly 1 falcon perches on the glove, shown in sharp detail with cream-and-brown speckled chest, dark patterned wings, hooked beak, alert eye, and talons gripping the glove. Background: ancient tan stone arches and tower walls receding diagonally on the right, a low stone parapet on the left, distant countryside visible through the open area, softly blurred depth of field. Lighting is warm sunset light from the left, natural shadows, high-end editorial fashion photography, realistic textures in wool, leather, feathers, and stone, 3:4 aspect ratio. Use dark charcoal, falcon, medieval stone fortress courtyard, and golden-hour sunset. No text, no watermark, no extra animals, no fantasy armor, no illustration style.
